notes: All 24 steps + 1 prerequisite completed. Full EDL generation and validation implemented. validator.py: ValidationResult dataclass, 5 validation checks (overlap, duration, clip_id existence, timecode bounds, audio levels). edl.py: EdlError, TOOL_DEFINITIONS parsed from prompt, generate_edl with LLM tool-use, tool call collection, DB persistence, validation retry loop (up to 3 retries).

summary: Create empty autopilot/plan/edl.py and autopilot/plan/validator.py files with module docstrings and __all__ stubs so imports work; Write tests for ValidationResult dataclass and validate_edl public API surface: importability, signature checks, ValidationResult has passed/errors/warnings fields; Implement ValidationResult dataclass in validator.py with passed: bool, errors: list[str], warnings: list[str] fields. Implement validate_edl stub that returns a passing ValidationResult. Export EdlValidationError, ValidationResult, validate_edl in __all__.; Write tests for validate_edl: no overlapping clips on same track. Test cases: (a) non-overlapping clips pass, (b) overlapping clips on same track fail with descriptive error, (c) overlapping clips on different tracks pass; Implement overlap detection in validate_edl: group select_clip entries by track, sort by in_timecode, check for overlaps. Add timecode_to_seconds helper to parse HH:MM:SS.mmm format.; Write tests for validate_edl: total duration check within ±10% of scripted target. Test cases: (a) within tolerance passes, (b) over 10% above fails, (c) over 10% below fails, (d) exactly at boundary passes; Implement total duration check in validate_edl: sum durations of all select_clip entries on track 1, compare against target_duration_seconds in EDL, flag error if outside ±10%; Write tests for validate_edl: all referenced clip_ids exist in catalog. Test cases: (a) all valid clip_ids pass, (b) unknown clip_id fails with error listing the missing ID; Implement clip_id existence check: collect all clip_ids from select_clip entries, verify each exists via db.get_media(), report errors for missing ones; Write tests for validate_edl: in/out points within clip duration bounds. Test cases: (a) valid in/out within duration passes, (b) out_timecode exceeding clip duration fails, (c) in_timecode after out_timecode fails; Implement in/out timecode bounds check: for each select_clip, convert timecodes to seconds, verify both are within [0, clip_duration] and in < out; Write tests for validate_edl: audio levels broadcast-safe range (-24 to 0 dBFS). Test cases: (a) levels in range pass, (b) level below -24 dB generates warning, (c) level above 0 dB generates error; Implement audio level check: iterate set_audio entries, verify level_db in [-24, 0] for speech clips. Values outside range produce errors; optionally issue warnings for borderline values.; Write tests for generate_edl public API surface: importability, signature (narrative_id, db, config) -> dict, EdlError is a proper Exception subclass; Implement EdlError exception class and generate_edl function stub in edl.py that raises EdlError('Not implemented'). Export EdlError, generate_edl, TOOL_DEFINITIONS in __all__.; Write tests for generate_edl: LLM interaction basics. Test cases: (a) calls anthropic with config.planning_model, (b) passes edit_planner.md as system prompt, (c) passes tool definitions in tools param, (d) user message includes script data and storyboard, (e) narrative not found raises EdlError; Implement generate_edl LLM call: load script from narrative_scripts table, load storyboard via build_narrative_storyboard, load edit_planner.md prompt, build TOOL_DEFINITIONS list from prompt JSON blocks, call anthropic with tools= parameter, handle tool_use content blocks by collecting tool calls into EDL structure; Write tests for generate_edl: tool-use response collection. Mock anthropic to return content blocks with type='tool_use', verify (a) select_clip calls collected into clips array, (b) add_transition calls collected into transitions array, (c) set_audio calls collected into audio_settings array, (d) all 8 tool types properly categorized in EDL dict; Implement tool call collection: iterate response.content blocks, dispatch by tool name to appropriate EDL section (clips, transitions, crop_modes, titles, audio_settings, music, voiceovers, broll_requests). Include target_duration_seconds from narrative.; Write tests for generate_edl: DB persistence and status update. Test cases: (a) EDL stored in edit_plans table via upsert_edit_plan, (b) narrative status updated to 'planned', (c) validation result also stored in edit_plans.validation_json; Implement DB persistence: after collecting EDL, call validate_edl, store edl_json and validation_json via db.upsert_edit_plan, update narrative status to 'planned' via db.update_narrative_status; Write tests for generate_edl: validation retry loop. Test cases: (a) validation passes on first try — no retry, (b) validation fails then passes on retry — LLM called twice with error feedback in second call, (c) validation fails 3 times — EdlError raised with validation errors, (d) retry message includes previous validation errors; Implement retry loop: after LLM call, run validate_edl. If validation fails, re-prompt LLM with error list (up to 3 retries). On final failure, raise EdlError with concatenated validation errors. On success, store and return EDL.; Write integration test: full pipeline with seeded DB data -> generate_edl with mocked LLM returning valid tool-use calls -> verify EDL structure, DB state (edit_plans stored, narrative status 'planned'), validation passes; Final cleanup: ensure all error paths are covered, add logging, verify all __all__ exports are correct, run full test suite
Debug fix for: Failures: lint issues, type errors

Steps 25-28: Added defensive handling for malformed timecodes, missing keys, and non-numeric catalog data in validator.py. Added _safe_timecode() helper. All _check_* helpers now catch KeyError/ValueError/TypeError and append errors to ValidationResult instead of propagating exceptions. 8 new tests added (5 malformed timecodes + 3 catalog data). Total: 51 tests passing.
